title: Add Cargo.toml deps for jmap-chat-egui
description:
Add all missing dependencies to crates/jmap-chat-egui/Cargo.toml so the crate can depend on jmap-chat, clap, and tokio.

What: Update Cargo.toml to declare all needed workspace and non-workspace deps.

Algorithm:
1. Add jmap-chat = { path = '../jmap-chat' } (local dep)
2. Add tokio.workspace = true
3. Add clap = { version = '4', features = ['derive'] } (not in workspace, add directly)
4. Remove any duplicate/unused deps.
5. Run cargo check -p jmap-chat-egui to confirm.

Defensive rules:
- No unwrap in any build.rs or proc-macro path.
- Keep minimal features; do not pull in unnecessary tokio features.

Tests:
- cargo check -p jmap-chat-egui must succeed with zero errors.
- cargo clippy -p jmap-chat-egui must emit zero errors.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p jmap-chat-egui exits 0; cargo clippy -p jmap-chat-egui exits 0
close_reason: Cargo.toml updated with all deps; cargo check clean
